text: Lesson 55 The Sawyer family Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 第55课 索耶一家 听录音,然后回答问题。
zh_hant: 第55課 索耶一家 聽錄音,然後回答問題。

text: When do the children do their homework?
zh: 孩子们什么时候做作业?
zh_hant: 孩子們什麼時候做作業?

text: The Sawyers live at 87 King Street.
zh: 索耶一家住在国王街87号。
zh_hant: 索耶一家住在國王街87號。

text: In the morning, Mr. Sawyer goes to work and the children go to school.
zh: 早上,索耶先生去上班,孩子们去上学。
zh_hant: 早上,索耶先生去上班,孩子們去上學。

text: Their father takes them to school every day.
zh: 他们的爸爸每天送他们上学。
zh_hant: 他們的爸爸每天送他們上學。

text: Mrs. Sawyer stays at home every day.
zh: 索耶太太每天都待在家里。
zh_hant: 索耶太太每天都待在家裡。

text: She always eats her lunch at noon.
In the afternoon, she usually sees her friends.
In the evening, the children come home from school.
Mr. Sawyer comes home from work.
At night, the children always do their homework.
zh: 晚上,孩子们总是做作业。
zh_hant: 晚上,孩子們總是做作業。

text: Mr. Sawyer usually reads his newspaper, but sometimes he and his wife watch television.
zh: 索耶先生通常看报纸,但有时他和妻子会看电视。
zh_hant: 索耶先生通常看報紙,但有時他和妻子會看電視。
